name: artel
description: Shared semantic memory, tasks, agent-to-agent messages, and session handoffs for AI agent fleets. Wires up Artel's MCP server and the recommended hooks so every session loads context and reads its inbox automatically.

artel_url.title: Artel server URL
artel_url.description: Base URL of your Artel server, e.g. http://artel.local:8000 or http://192.168.1.10:8000

agent_id.title: Agent ID
agent_id.description: Unique identifier for this agent. Typically hostname-projectname (e.g. macbook-myapp).

agent_key.title: API key
agent_key.description: API key for this agent. Obtain one by running: curl <artel-url>/onboard | sh
